Package global.thalion.ttio

Class UVVisSpectrum

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.Spectrum
global.thalion.ttio.UVVisSpectrum
public class UVVisSpectrum extends Spectrum
1-D UV-visible absorption spectrum: wavelength (nm) and absorbance channels plus path-length and solvent metadata.

API status: Stable (v0.11.1).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOUVVisSpectrum, Python ttio.uv_vis_spectrum.UVVisSpectrum.
